values.content: =In 1–2 short sentences, give a plain-text cash-flow insight for a business owner based on: outstanding {{ $json.outstanding }}, overdue {{ $json.overdue }}, due this week {{ $json.dueThisWeek }}, top debtors {{ $json.topDebtors }}. No markdown, no greeting, no sign-off, no bullets — just the insight.

parameters.content:
## 📊 CashChaser — Weekly Cash-Flow Brief
Every Monday: reads unpaid Xero invoices, computes the receivables picture, and emails the owner a branded HTML brief with an AI insight. The retention feature that justifies the monthly fee.

### 1 · Monday trigger + pull unpaid
Weekly schedule. Xero fetch filtered to Statuses=AUTHORISED (unpaid only) — receivables are just the unpaid invoices, so no big pagination.

### 2 · Compute receivables
Totals: outstanding · overdue · due-this-week · top 5 debtors. Pure calc from invoice data — no reports.read scope needed.

### 3 · AI insight
gpt-4o-mini writes a 1-2 sentence plain-English cash-flow insight from the numbers (who to chase, expected cash).

### 4 · Branded HTML → owner
Deterministic HTML template (totals table with overdue in red, debtor list, AI insight callout) → emailed to the owner. Looks designed, not a raw data dump.
